title: Simon Finnigan
description: Professional rugby league coach & former Ireland international rugby league footballer
extract:
Simon Finnigan (born 8 December 1981) is a professional rugby league coach who is the assistant head coach at Oldham in the Betfred Championship and a former professional rugby league footballer.
He was previously the head coach of the Widnes Vikings in the Championship and was previously head coach at Newcastle Thunder and an assistant coach at the Toronto Wolfpack. An Ireland international second-row, he played in the Super League for the Widnes Vikings, Salford City Reds, Bradford Bulls and the Huddersfield Giants, and in the Championship for the Leigh Centurions.
